Klasse Schedule

java.lang.Object
io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntityBase
io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntity
at.jku.se.entity.Schedule
@Entity public class Schedule extends io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntity
A time-based schedule that executes a fixed device action on a recurring pattern (FR-09). Unlike rules, schedules have no additional condition — they fire unconditionally at the specified time. Also used as the applied plan for vacation mode (FR-21).

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    String
    actionValue
    The value to apply when the schedule fires.
    Boolean
    active
    Whether this schedule is currently active.
    String
    cronExpression
    Cron expression defining the recurrence pattern (e.g., "0 7 * * MON-FRI").
    Device
    device
    The device this schedule acts on.
    String
    name
    Descriptive name for the schedule (e.g., "Morning Lights").
    User
    user
    The user who owns this schedule.

    Von Klasse geerbte Felder io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntity

    id

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Schedule()
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntityBase

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • name

      public String name
      Descriptive name for the schedule (e.g., "Morning Lights").

    • cronExpression

      public String cronExpression
      Cron expression defining the recurrence pattern (e.g., "0 7 * * MON-FRI"). Format: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week.

    • device

      public Device device
      The device this schedule acts on. Schedule is deleted automatically when the device is removed.

    • actionValue

      public String actionValue
      The value to apply when the schedule fires. Encoded as a string to support all device types (e.g., "true" for a switch, "75.0" for a dimmer level).

    • active

      public Boolean active
      Whether this schedule is currently active.

    • user

      public User user
      The user who owns this schedule.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Schedule

      public Schedule()
      Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
